title: convolvulus cinerascens
intro: Convolvulus cinerascens, also known as the ashen bindweed or silver bindweed, is a flowering plant species in the morning glory family. The medicinal properties of Convolvulus cinerascens include its use as a treatment for various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus cinerascens include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Convolvulus cinerascens can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
